litigation.mdlName: In re: Hair Relaxer Marketing, Sales Practices, and Products Liability Litigation
litigation.court: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Illinois

phaseDetail: Federal hair relaxer cases are coordinated in MDL-3060 in the Northern District of Illinois. Claims generally allege that chemical hair straightener and relaxer products are linked to uterine cancer, ovarian cancer, endometrial cancer, or related gynecologic injuries. Defendants dispute liability and causation.

settlements.label: Global settlement
settlements.detail: No global public settlement has been announced for the federal MDL. Individual outcomes, if any, depend on facts, proof, and court rulings.

keyDates.label: MDL-3060 established
keyDates.detail: JPML centralized federal hair relaxer product liability cases in the Northern District of Illinois.

keyDates.label: 11,723 actions pending
keyDates.detail: JPML's June 2026 monthly report listed 11,723 pending actions in MDL-3060.

sources.name: NIH - Hair straightening chemicals associated with higher uterine cancer risk
